page_metadata.biotools__summary: A method to identify open reading frames (ORF) using Ribosome profiling (Ribo-seq) experiments embedded in a pipeline for data analysis. It is part of GEDI software platform.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A method to identify open reading frames (ORF) using Ribosome profiling (Ribo-seq) experiments embedded in a pipeline for data analysis. It is part of GEDI software platform.
